frontmatter.title: Open Source Maintenance in the Age of AI Contributors
frontmatter.subtitle: When every developer has an AI copilot, the signal-to-noise problem in your repo gets much harder. Here's how Layer5 handles it.
frontmatter.description: AI tools have flooded open source repos with well-formatted but shallow PRs. Here's how to raise the quality bar without closing the door.
frontmatter.author: Layer5 Team
